title: Fanfic ideas
wikitext:
[]: Fanfic ideas [SPOILERS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!]             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 13, 2009 5:21 pm Im working on a fanfic and have a friend working on one as well where I think I/we could use Beast Mode from 2.0 and was wondering if anyone who might/ does have any would mind sharing some pics or scans for Shinji in Beast Mode, Mari would work as well, but its going to be Shinji who has the "ability".

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 13, 2009 7:02 pm This may be related to rebuild, but the fanfics should go to Fandom Area ok? EDIT : Ok, if they say so... i won't argue with that. Admins are like gods here, better obey than get kicked out of the forums.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 13, 2009 7:25 pm sorry.... but I tried to put it there earlier and an admin gave me another strike and told to put it here, or it may have been because of spoilers...... im not sure, but just to be safe im going to leave it here so i dont get banned

[]: Re: Fanfic ideals [SPOILERS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!]             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Aug 13, 2009 7:25 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Shinji in Beast Mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 13, 2009 7:27 pm Berserker, when he was fighting Zureul? not sure of spelling.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Thu Aug 13, 2009 8:40 pm Oh, well Shinji doesn't go "beast mode" per say. Berserk and beast seem to be two different things.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 13, 2009 9:19 pm Berserk is something that they did not expect. Beast mode on the other hand is something that Ritz knew beforehand...or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Thu Aug 13, 2009 10:11 pm So far, Mari's the only one to go into Beast Mode. Although similar, the two seem to be completely different, strangely enough. Berserker is when the Eva opens its mouth and regains control of itself, when this happens the pilot seems to have no control. The human Eva takes completely over. Beast Mode is when the Eva's restraints are forcibly removed, but the pilot still has control. Like the name suggests, the Eva seems to resort to its pure, animalistic instincts, which is why EVA-02 was running around on all fours, slobbering everywhere. In fact, I'm going to fanwank that the pilot needs to maintain a higher level of concentration or something to control and Eva in Beast Mode. Think of a little girl being dragged along by a thrashing, rabid dog on a leash.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 14, 2009 1:56 am trueno_twentyone wrote: This may be related to rebuild, but the fanfics should go to Fandom Area ok?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:27 am So Mr. Tines, where will this particular thread be going? it's kinda confusing because it's rebuild at the same time a fanfic thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:41 am It's a request for fanart. was wondering if anyone who might/ does have any would mind sharing some pics or scans for Shinji in Beast Mode, Mari would work as well

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Aug 15, 2009 3:30 am If you've seen the camrip,cant you just pause at what scene you need and just work it into your fic?Because that may be the only way since there arent any pic's of it anywhere yet.At least I dont think there are any.
